movie.actors: Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Sigourney Weaver, Harold Ramis
movie.plot: The discovery of a massive river of ectoplasm and a resurgence of spectral activity allows the staff of Ghostbusters to revive the business.
movie.title: Ghostbusters II
movie.writer: Dan Aykroyd (characters), Harold Ramis (characters), Harold Ramis, Dan Aykroyd
